spans.content: S.-T. Yau College Student Mathematics Contests 2013
This exam of 160 points is designed to test how much you
know rather than how much you don’t know. You are not
expected to finish all problems but do as much as you can.
1.1 (15 pt) Classify finite groups of order 26 up to isomorphisms.
